statusTrace:
self = <Pages.systemPage.expression_page.ExpressionPage object at 0x000002A0D8FC2B30>, by_or_element = 'xpath', value = '(//span[text()="1新增菜单"])[1]', wait_time = 10, retries = 2

    def click(self, by_or_element, value=None, wait_time=10, retries=2):
        """
        更稳健的点击方法：支持定位符或 WebElement，自动处理 stale 元素、点击拦截等问题。
        最后兜底：视觉识别 + AI 修复定位器
        """
        element = None  # 初始化，供后续异常处理使用
    
        for attempt in range(retries):
            try:
                if value is not None:
                    by = by_or_element
                    logging.info(f"点击元素：By = {by}, Value = {value}")
                    element = WebDriverWait(self.driver, wait_time).until(
                        EC.element_to_be_clickable((by, value))
                    )
                else:
                    logging.info("点击元素：WebElement 对象")
                    element = by_or_element
    
                element.click()
                logging.info("✅ 点击成功")
                return
    
            except ElementClickInterceptedException:
                logging.warning("⚠️ 原生点击被拦截，尝试使用 JS 点击")
                try:
                    self.driver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", element)
                    logging.info("✅ JS 点击成功")
                    return
                except Exception as js_error:
                    logging.warning(f"⚠️ JS 点击失败：{js_error}")
                    sleep(1)
                    continue
    
            except StaleElementReferenceException:
                logging.warning(f"⚠️ 第 {attempt + 1} 次点击失败：元素过期，尝试重新定位")
                sleep(1)
                continue
    
            except TimeoutException:
                logging.error(f"❌ 元素未在 {wait_time} 秒内变为可点击")
                # 不立即抛出，先尝试兜底方案
                break
    
            except Exception as e:
                logging.warning(f"点击失败：{e}")
                if attempt == retries - 1:
                    # 重试用完，准备进入兜底方案
                    break
                sleep(1)
    
        # ========== 兜底方案开始 ==========
    
        # 第二层：视觉兜底点击（需存在 images/{value}.png）
        try:
            if value is not None:
                image_path = f"images/{value}.png"
                if os.path.exists(image_path) and self.visual_click(image_path):
                    logging.info("🎯 视觉识别点击成功")
                    return
        except:
            pass
    
        # 第三层：AI 生成新定位器并再次点击
        try:
            print("[AI Agent] click 失败，交给 AI 修复定位器…")
    
            if value is None:
                raise RuntimeError("AI 修复 click 需要原始 locator（by + value），不能使用 WebElement 调用 click()")
    
            failed_locator = value
    
>           ai_json = self.ai_decide(failed_locator, "click failed")

    @allure.story("设置菜单,显示模块显示应用成功")
    # @pytest.mark.run(order=1)
    def test_module_setmenu1(self, login_to_module):
        driver = login_to_module  # WebDriver 实例
        module = ExpressionPage(driver)  # 用 driver 初始化 ExpressionPage
        add = AddsPages(driver)
        apps = AppsPage(driver)
        date_driver = DateDriver()
        role = RolePage(driver)
        # 新增菜单
        name = "1新增菜单"
        sleep(1)
        module.click_button(f'(//span[text()="菜单组件"])[1]')
        module.wait_for_loading_to_disappear()
        module.select_input_menu(name)
        sleep(1)
        ele = module.finds_elements(By.XPATH, f'//table[@class="vxe-table--body"]//tr/td[2]//span[text()="{name}"]')
        if len(ele) == 0:
            module.click_all_button("新增")
            module.enter_texts('//div[span[text()=" 组件代码 "]]/following-sibling::div//input', name)
            module.enter_texts('//div[span[text()=" 组件名称 "]]/following-sibling::div//input', name)
            module.click_button('//div[span[text()=" 图标 "]]/following-sibling::div//i')
            module.click_button('//div[div[text()="请选择图标"]]/following-sibling::div//div[@class="flex-wrap"]/div')
            sleep(0.5)
            module.click_confirm()
            message = module.get_find_message()
            module.wait_for_loading_to_disappear()
            module.select_input_menu(name)
            sleep(1)
            assert message == "新增成功！"
        eles = module.get_find_element_xpath(f'//table[@class="vxe-table--body"]//tr/td[2]//span[text()="{name}"]').text
        assert eles == name
    
        # 编辑模块
        module.click_button(f'(//span[text()="模块管理"])[1]')
        module.wait_for_loading_to_disappear()
        module.select_input_module('ABCDAA')

        module.click_button(f'(//span[text()="应用管理"])[1]')
        apps.wait_for_loading_to_disappear()
        name = "1新增应用"
        apps.select_input(name)
        ele = module.finds_elements(By.XPATH, f'//table[@class="vxe-table--body"]//tr/td[2]//span[text()="{name}"]')
        if len(ele) == 0:
            module.click_all_button("新增")
            sleep(1)
            xpath_list = [
                '//div[@class="d-flex"]/div[label[text()="应用代码"]]//input',
                '//div[@class="d-flex"]/div[label[text()="应用名称"]]//input',
                '//div[@class="d-flex"]/div[label[text()="模块名称"]]//input[@type="text"]',

self = <Pages.systemPage.expression_page.ExpressionPage object at 0x000002A0D8FC2B30>, by_or_element = 'xpath', value = '(//span[text()="1新增菜单"])[1]', wait_time = 10, retries = 2

    def click(self, by_or_element, value=None, wait_time=10, retries=2):
        """
        更稳健的点击方法：支持定位符或 WebElement，自动处理 stale 元素、点击拦截等问题。
        最后兜底：视觉识别 + AI 修复定位器
        """
        element = None  # 初始化，供后续异常处理使用
    
        for attempt in range(retries):
            try:
                if value is not None:
                    by = by_or_element
                    logging.info(f"点击元素：By = {by}, Value = {value}")
                    element = WebDriverWait(self.driver, wait_time).until(
                        EC.element_to_be_clickable((by, value))
                    )
                else:
                    logging.info("点击元素：WebElement 对象")
                    element = by_or_element
    
                element.click()
                logging.info("✅ 点击成功")
                return
    
            except ElementClickInterceptedException:
                logging.warning("⚠️ 原生点击被拦截，尝试使用 JS 点击")
                try:
                    self.driver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", element)
                    logging.info("✅ JS 点击成功")
                    return
                except Exception as js_error:
                    logging.warning(f"⚠️ JS 点击失败：{js_error}")
                    sleep(1)
                    continue
    
            except StaleElementReferenceException:
                logging.warning(f"⚠️ 第 {attempt + 1} 次点击失败：元素过期，尝试重新定位")
                sleep(1)
                continue
    
            except TimeoutException:
                logging.error(f"❌ 元素未在 {wait_time} 秒内变为可点击")
                # 不立即抛出，先尝试兜底方案
                break
    
            except Exception as e:
                logging.warning(f"点击失败：{e}")
                if attempt == retries - 1:
                    # 重试用完，准备进入兜底方案
                    break
                sleep(1)
    
        # ========== 兜底方案开始 ==========
    
        # 第二层：视觉兜底点击（需存在 images/{value}.png）
        try:
            if value is not None:
                image_path = f"images/{value}.png"
                if os.path.exists(image_path) and self.visual_click(image_path):
                    logging.info("🎯 视觉识别点击成功")
                    return
        except:
            pass
    
        # 第三层：AI 生成新定位器并再次点击
        try:
            print("[AI Agent] click 失败，交给 AI 修复定位器…")
    
            if value is None:
                raise RuntimeError("AI 修复 click 需要原始 locator（by + value），不能使用 WebElement 调用 click()")
    
            failed_locator = value
    
            ai_json = self.ai_decide(failed_locator, "click failed")
            cleaned_json = self._clean_json_response(ai_json)
            data = json.loads(cleaned_json)
    
            new_locator = data.get("locator")
            if not new_locator:
                raise RuntimeError("AI 未返回 locator")
    
            logging.info(f"🤖 AI 修复成功，新点击定位器：{new_locator}")
    
            self._record_ai_event("fix", value, new_locator, True, "click_fix_success")
    
            if new_locator.startswith("//"):
                new_by = By.XPATH
            else:
                new_by = By.CSS_SELECTOR
    
            element = WebDriverWait(self.driver, wait_time).until(
                EC.element_to_be_clickable((new_by, new_locator))
            )
            element.click()
            logging.info("✅ 点击成功（AI 修复后）")
            return
    
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(f"AI 修复失败：{e}")
            self._record_ai_event("fix", value, None, False, f"click_fix_fail: {e}")
>           raise RuntimeError(f"点击失败（AI 也无法修复）：{e}")
